specific_question: What percentage of customer service interactions came through Elexion Automotive's mobile app in Q4 2024?
answer: According to the sales and marketing department's report at Elexion Automotive, 40% of all customer service interactions came through the mobile app in Q4 2024.
dr_question: How could Elexion Automotive utilize Automotive Cloud's dealer performance management tools by early 2027 to strengthen relationships with its North American dealer network and, at the same time, maintain 90% of its direct-to-government sales channel?
